heading: Omitted
label: 1337a to 1337c Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 1337a to 1337c were omitted as not of general application, and as covered by the Canal Zone Code. The Canal Zone Code was subsequently redesignated the Panama Canal Code by , and repealed by .Pub. L. 96–70, § 3303(b)Pub.
